caption: A man with a shaved head and a full beard is seated in a recording studio in front of a black acoustic foam wall. He wears over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a black logo that reads "Stay Humble" with "MIND OVER" written in smaller text below it. A large silver professional microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. The man has a visible tattoo on his right forearm. As the sequence progresses, he is speaking into the microphone, his expression shifting from a look of focused concentration and surprise with an open mouth to a slight smile and a laugh. His gaze remains directed slightly off-camera to his right throughout the clip while he continues to communicate.
